case_title: ABDULLAH BAREKZAI VS. JOSEPH GATCHALIAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAREKZAI, ABDULLAH SERVED SEP-19-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GATCHALIAN, JOSEPH
ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT GATCHALIAN, JOSEPH
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-01-2003.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MAHMOUD ABOUZEID.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-02-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-21-2003. JAN-17-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAREKZAI, ABDULLAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GATCHALIAN, JOSEPH $3,560.34 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,560.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF ABDULLAH BAREKZAI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- O F F C A L E N D A R -- UNTIMLEY NOTICED PER CCP 437C(A). (PHA/301) REPORTER: CARL SAUCEDA, CSR #2031
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-27-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-10-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED SEP-02-2003. ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
